name: Content Library v4 Redesign
description: Complete redesign of the Content Library system. Consolidates fragmented storage, fixes broken pipelines, unifies the schema, and connects Zo's save_webpage to N5's knowledge layer.
objective: A single, coherent system where: (1) All content lives in one canonical location, (2) All content is tracked in one database, (3) Semantic memory can retrieve content, (4) save_webpage automatically ingests, (5) Documentation matches reality.
key_decisions: Canonical storage location: Knowledge/content-library/ (not Personal/Knowledge/ContentLibrary/ or Articles/)
Single database: N5/data/content_library.db (upgrade in place, don't create v3.db)
Content types: link, snippet, article, deck, social-post, podcast, video, book, paper, framework, quote
Auto-ingest: New articles from save_webpage should automatically enter the system
Semantic profiles: Update n5_memory_client.py to include correct paths
Archive failed v3: Move N5/builds/content-library-v3/ to quarantine

workers.description: Migrate N5/data/content_library.db schema: (1) Rename 'type' column to 'content_type' (better semantics), (2) Remove CHECK constraint to allow new types, (3) Add new columns: source_url, source_file_path, ingested_at, word_count, has_embedding. Preserve all existing data.
acceptance_criteria: Existing 127 items preserved with data intact
New content_type column allows: link, snippet, article, deck, social-post, podcast, video, book, paper, framework, quote
Schema documented in migration script header

workers.description: Consolidate content storage: (1) Move Articles/* to Knowledge/content-library/articles/, (2) Ensure Knowledge/content-library/ has correct subdirectories (articles/, articles/vrijen/, decks/, social-posts/, etc.), (3) Create .n5protected in Knowledge/content-library/. Document the moves in a manifest.
acceptance_criteria: Articles/ directory empty or removed
All articles now in Knowledge/content-library/articles/
V's Medium articles in Knowledge/content-library/articles/vrijen/
.n5protected exists at Knowledge/content-library/
Move manifest created at N5/builds/content-library-v4/move_manifest.json

workers.description: Create N5/scripts/content_ingest.py that: (1) Takes a file path (e.g., new article markdown), (2) Extracts metadata from frontmatter if present, (3) Auto-generates title from filename if needed, (4) Creates DB record with correct content_type, (5) Optionally moves file to canonical location if not already there. Support --dry-run flag.
acceptance_criteria: Script can ingest an article: python3 N5/scripts/content_ingest.py /path/to/article.md --type article
Script auto-detects type from file location if not specified
Script has --dry-run that shows what would happen
Script has --move flag to relocate file to canonical path
Script logs to N5/runtime/runs/content-ingest/

workers.description: Create and run a backfill script that: (1) Scans Knowledge/content-library/ for all content files, (2) Checks if each file has a DB record, (3) Creates missing records with appropriate content_type, (4) Reports on what was backfilled. This should be idempotent.
acceptance_criteria: All existing articles have DB records
All V's Medium articles have DB records with tag 'vrijen-authored'
Backfill report shows counts by content_type
Running twice produces no duplicates

workers.description: Upgrade N5/scripts/content_library.py to: (1) Support all new content_types, (2) Add 'ingest' subcommand that calls content_ingest.py, (3) Add 'sync' subcommand that calls content_backfill.py, (4) Update 'search' to filter by content_type, (5) Add 'list-types' subcommand showing counts per type.
acceptance_criteria: python3 N5/scripts/content_library.py list-types shows all content_type counts
python3 N5/scripts/content_library.py search --type article works
python3 N5/scripts/content_library.py ingest /path/to/file.md works
python3 N5/scripts/content_library.py sync runs backfill
Existing quick-add, add, stats commands still work

workers.description: Update N5/cognition/n5_memory_client.py: (1) Fix content-library profile to point to Knowledge/content-library/, (2) Remove references to non-existent Personal/Knowledge/ContentLibrary/, (3) Add Articles/ as fallback path during transition period, (4) Test that semantic search for content works.
acceptance_criteria: content-library profile points to Knowledge/content-library/
Semantic search for 'RLM' or 'recursive language' finds the article
No references to non-existent paths

workers.description: Create a mechanism so that when save_webpage writes to Articles/ (Zo's default), the content is automatically ingested into the system. Options: (1) Create a Zo rule that triggers ingest after save_webpage, (2) Create a watcher script, (3) Modify save_webpage default path. Recommend option 1 (Zo rule).
acceptance_criteria: After save_webpage, content appears in DB within same conversation
File is moved to canonical location OR a symlink is created
No manual intervention required

workers.description: Update all documentation to reflect reality: (1) Rewrite N5/capabilities/internal/content-library-v3.md → rename to content-library-v4.md, (2) Update Documents/System/guides/content-library-system.md, (3) Archive old v3 build docs to quarantine. All paths, commands, and schema descriptions must match actual system.
acceptance_criteria: Capability doc renamed to content-library-v4.md with correct paths
System guide updated with correct CLI commands
Old v3 build archived to N5/quarantine/deprecated-content-library/
No documentation references non-existent paths

workers.description: Final cleanup: (1) Remove empty Articles/ directory if all content moved, (2) Archive N5/builds/content-library-v3/ to quarantine, (3) Remove deprecated scripts from quarantine that are no longer needed, (4) Run full system verification.
acceptance_criteria: No orphaned content files outside Knowledge/content-library/
Old v3 build in quarantine
System verification passes: all articles in DB, semantic memory works, CLI works
